examples: My recollection of events differs from his.
The recollection, the excitement of the night and all the restrained sorrow overpowered the child.
Recollection brought fresh waves of sorrow, and sobs again took full charge of him, preventing further speech.
Doctors now say Jessica Lynch has no recollection of the whole episode and probably never will.
My recollection is that I managed to survive the Four Questions, perhaps even garnering modest applause.
